metadata.title: Charity Project
metadata.description: The Charity Project is an independent and global solidarity initiative that supports people and families in vulnerable situations, with essential goods, health support and connections to donors.
metadata.ogDescription: Independent and global solidarity initiative: essential goods, health support and connection between donors and beneficiaries.

home.heroSubtitle: An independent, global solidarity initiative that supports people and families in vulnerable situations, wherever they are.
home.aboutP1: The Charity Project is an initiative that aims to support people and families in situations of social vulnerability with the provision of essential goods, support for physical and mental health and connection with donors.
home.aboutP2: It is a concrete expression of solidarity in action, based on the principles of human dignity and care for those most in need, without distinction of origin, creed or nationality. We believe that small gestures of solidarity can transform lives and restore human dignity.
home.eixo1Desc: Donation of food, clothing and hygiene products to families in vulnerable situations.
home.eixo2Desc: Consultations with health professionals and psychological support for those who need it most.
home.eixo3Desc: Platform for connecting specific needs and donors willing to help.
home.helpSubtitle: There are several ways to contribute to the Charity Project. Every gesture of solidarity makes a difference in the lives of those who need it most.
home.helpVolunteerDesc: Donate your time and talents to help with the project’s various activities.
home.helpGoodsDesc: Contribute food, clothing, hygiene products and other essential items.
home.helpMoneyDesc: Make a financial contribution to help keep the projects running.
home.testimonial1Quote: When I lost my job during the pandemic, I didn't know how I was going to feed my three children. The Charity Project not only provided us with food, but also helped me find a new job. I will be eternally grateful.
home.testimonial2Quote: Volunteering at Projecto Caridade transformed my worldview. Seeing the direct impact we can have on people's lives is a priceless experience. Every smile we receive is our greatest reward.
home.testimonial3Quote: As a doctor, I always wanted to help beyond the office. At Projecto Caridade, I can offer assistance to those who really don't have access. It is gratifying to see the recovery of people who, without this support, would not be able to take care of their health.
home.testimonial4Quote: My company started donating monthly to Projecto Caridade and we decided to visit to see the work up close. We were impressed by the seriousness and real impact that each contribution has. It is work that deserves our full support.
home.beneficiariesCardTitle: How to receive support from the Charity Project
home.beneficiariesIntro: If you or your family are experiencing difficulties and need support, Projecto Caridade is here to help. Our registration process is simple and welcoming.
beneficiariesWho: Families in situations of social vulnerability
People who are unemployed or have insufficient income
Elderly people in a situation of abandonment

form.genericError: An error has occurred. Please try again later.

voluntario.metaDescription: Your time and talent are the most precious gifts you can offer. Become a volunteer and help us bring hope and dignity to those who need it most.
voluntario.heroSubtitle: Your time and talent are the most precious gifts you can offer. Become a volunteer and help us bring hope and dignity to those who need it most.
voluntario.whyP1: At the heart of Projecto Caridade is the conviction that solidarity is manifested through actions. Our volunteers are the driving force behind every food basket delivered, every item of clothing donated and every smile of relief. When you volunteer, you are not just donating your time; you are investing in lives, building community and being an agent of social transformation.
voluntario.whyP2: Every dedicated hour makes an immeasurable difference in the lives of the families we support.
voluntario.opsSubtitle: Our "Helpful Hand" axis needs help on several fronts. See where you can fit your talents:
voluntario.op1Desc: Support in receiving, sorting and organizing donations of food, clothing and hygiene products. Keeping our warehouse organized is essential for efficient distribution.
voluntario.op2Desc: Participate in distribution days, helping to assemble basic food baskets and deliver goods to beneficiary families with a smile and a word of comfort.
voluntario.op3Desc: Help with the registration process for new families, carrying out reception interviews to understand their needs in a dignified and respectful way.
voluntario.formIntro: Fill out the form below and our team will get in touch with you shortly. Thank you for your interest!
voluntario.messageLabel: Message (Tell us a little about yourself and your availability)
voluntario.successBody: Thank you for your interest in making a difference. We will contact you shortly.
voluntario.error: An error occurred while submitting your application. Please try again later.

cadastro.formIntro: After submission, our social action team will analyze your request and contact you for an intake interview. If you have difficulties, you can go to our headquarters.
cadastro.children: Number of Children (up to 17 years old)
cadastro.situation: Briefly describe your situation and your main needs
cadastro.consent: I declare that the information provided is true and authorize Projecto Caridade to contact me to follow up on my request for support, in accordance with its privacy policy.
cadastro.consentRequired: You must accept the terms to submit the order.
cadastro.successBody: Thank you for contacting us. Our social action team will review your request and get in touch with you shortly.
cadastro.error: An error occurred while sending your order. Please try again later.

cadastroPage.metaDescription: Fill out the form to request support. Your information will be treated with complete confidentiality and respect.
cadastroPage.heroSubtitle: Fill out the form below to request support. Your information will be treated with complete confidentiality and respect.
cadastroPage.beforeIntro: To speed up your process, please read the criteria carefully and have the necessary documents at hand.
criteria: Families in a proven situation of social vulnerability.
People who are unemployed or have insufficient income for basic sustenance.
Elderly people in a situation of abandonment or with few resources.
People with health needs that they cannot cover.
docs: Copy of the person responsible's identification document.
Proof of address (water, electricity receipt or neighborhood declaration).
Copy of the identification document of other members of the household.

contacto.metaDescription: Do you have any questions, suggestions or would like to know more about our work? Get in touch!
contacto.heroSubtitle: Do you have any questions, suggestions or would like to know more about our work? Get in touch!
contacto.subject: Subject
contacto.successBody: Thank you for contacting us. We will respond as soon as possible.
contacto.error: An error occurred while sending your message. Please try again later.

doarBens.metaDescription: Each donated item is a gesture of love that reaches directly to families who need it most. See how your contribution can make a difference.
doarBens.heroTitle: Your Donation Warms Hearts and Fuels Hope.
doarBens.heroSubtitle: Each donated item is a gesture of love that reaches directly to families who need it most. See how your contribution can make a difference.
doarBens.whatIntro: All donations are welcome, but some items are essential for our daily work. See our list of priority needs, which directly support our 'Helping Hand' axis:
cat3Items: (We appreciate that the items are in good condition)
doarBens.howIntro: You can deliver your donations directly to our headquarters. Your generosity is the engine of our mission and each contribution is received with enormous gratitude.
doarBens.healthP1: In addition to basic necessities, our “Caring Heart” axis also needs support. We received donations of medical and nursing supplies to support our health actions in the community.
doarBens.healthItemsValue: Gloves, masks, dressing material, medicines (within the expiration date), among others.
doarBens.healthContactPre: If you are a healthcare professional or represent an entity and wish to contribute this type of material, please
doarBens.healthContactPost: to coordinate the best way to receive your help.

doarDinheiro.metaDescription: Your financial donation builds the bridge of hope. Each contribution is a pillar that supports our work and allows us to act where the need is most urgent.
doarDinheiro.heroTitle: Your Financial Donation Builds the Bridge of Hope
doarDinheiro.heroSubtitle: Each contribution, no matter how small, is a pillar that supports our work and allows us to act where the need is most urgent.
doarDinheiro.whyTitle: Why is your donation so important?
doarDinheiro.whyP1: While donations of goods are vital, financial contributions offer us the flexibility to quickly respond to emergencies, purchase specific foods that are in short supply, purchase essential medicines, and cover operational costs that make all of our work possible.
doarDinheiro.whyP2: Your donation becomes direct and efficient help, being the basis of our "Bridge of Hope" axis, which connects generosity to need.
doarDinheiro.copyError: Unable to copy IBAN. Please try manually.
doarDinheiro.mobileBody: Use your phone's camera to donate quickly and securely through your payments app.
doarDinheiro.transparencyBody: We are committed to using each donation with maximum responsibility and transparency. We regularly report on the use of funds, ensuring that your generosity actually reaches those who need it most. Your trust is our most valuable asset.

footer.newsletterDesc: Receive news about our actions and how you can help.
footer.newsletterError: An error has occurred. Please try again.
footer.slogan: With solidarity and love, we transform lives

privacidade.title: Privacy Policy
privacidade.intro: Your privacy is important to us. It is Projecto Caridade's policy to respect your privacy in relation to any information we may collect from you on the Projecto Caridade website, and other websites we own and operate.
privacidade.s1p1: We only request personal information when we truly need it to provide you with a service. We do so by fair and legal means, with your knowledge and consent. We also tell you why we are collecting it and how it will be used.
privacidade.s1p2: The data we collect through our forms (such as Contact, Volunteer Registration and Beneficiary Registration) includes, but is not limited to: name, email, telephone, address and other information relevant to the social assistance or volunteering process.
privacidade.s2p1: We only retain collected information for as long as necessary to provide the requested service. When we store data, we protect it within commercially acceptable means to prevent loss and theft, as well as unauthorized access, disclosure, copying, use or modification.
privacidade.s3p1: We do not share personally identifiable information publicly or with third parties, except when required by law or when necessary to carry out our social assistance activities, under strict confidentiality agreements.
privacidade.s4p1: You are free to refuse our request for personal information, understanding that we may not be able to provide some of your desired services (such as process analysis for assistance). You may, at any time, request access, rectification or deletion of your personal data from our databases.
privacidade.s5p1: Your continued use of our website will be considered acceptance of our practices around privacy and personal information. If you have any questions about how we handle user data and personal information, please contact us.

termos.title: Terms of Service
termos.s1p1: By accessing the Projecto Caridade website, you agree to be bound by these terms of service, all applicable laws and regulations, and agree that you are responsible for compliance with any applicable local laws. If you do not agree with any of these terms, you are prohibited from using or accessing this site.
termos.s2p1: Permission is granted to temporarily download one copy of the materials (information or software) on Projecto Caridade's website for personal, non-commercial transitory viewing only. This is the grant of a license, not a transfer of title, and under this license you may not:
s2Items: Use the materials for any commercial purpose or for public display;
Attempt to decompile or reverse engineer any software contained on the site;
Remove any copyright or other proprietary notations from the materials;
Transfer the materials to another person or 'mirror' the materials on any other server.
termos.s3p1: When submitting any form (Contact, Volunteer or Beneficiary Registration), you guarantee that all information provided is true, accurate and up to date. Submitting false data in social assistance applications may result in the application being refused.
termos.s4p1: The materials on Projecto Caridade's website are provided on an 'as is' basis. Projecto Caridade makes no warranties, expressed or implied, and hereby disclaims and negates all other warranties, including, without limitation, implied warranties or conditions of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, or non-infringement of intellectual property or other violation of rights.
termos.s5p1: In no event shall Projecto Caridade or its partners/suppliers be liable for any damages (including, without limitation, damages for loss of data or profit, or due to business interruption) arising out of the use or inability to use the materials on the site, even if Projecto Caridade or an authorized representative has been notified orally or in writing of the possibility of such damage.
termos.s6p1: Projecto Caridade may revise these terms of service for the website at any time without notice. By using this site, you are agreeing to be bound by the current version of these terms of service.

exclusao.title: Data Deletion Instructions
exclusao.intro: In accordance with data protection laws, Projecto Caridade guarantees your right to request the deletion of all your personal information from our databases.
exclusao.howIntro: To request the deletion of your data (such as beneficiary registration data, volunteer registrations or contact details), please follow the following steps:
steps: Send an email to info@caridade.ao with the subject “Data Deletion Request”.
In the body of the email, please include your full name and the email address and/or phone number you used on our forms.
Specify whether you want to delete all your data or just those from a specific section (e.g. unsubscribe from volunteering).
exclusao.deadlineBody: Our team will process your request as quickly as possible and within a maximum period of 15 working days. You will receive a confirmation email once the deletion is complete.
exclusao.afterBody: Once deletion is confirmed, your personal data will be permanently deleted from our systems, such as Firebase Firestore and email databases. If it is an ongoing case (for example, a social assistance case), deleting the data will discontinue the case and our ability to evaluate it will be interrupted.
